description: Reusable cross-tool skill package for planning and prompting cinematic websites with GSAP, three js, fal.ai
This is a frontend project to showcase web frontend skills.
The purpose of the assessment is to assess the web frontend skills required for the job. The software written is for assessment purposes only.
